---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 💭 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📊 Use Cases

Describe specific use cases for this feature:

1. Use case 1: ...
2. Use case 2: ...
3. Use case 3: ...

## 🎨 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples of similar features in other projects.

## 📈 Benefits

What are the benefits of this feature?

- Benefit 1
- Benefit 2
- Benefit 3

## ⚠️ Potential Drawbacks

Are there any potential drawbacks or considerations?

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link any related issues here.

## 🙋 Are you willing to help implement this feature?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] Yes, I can help with testing
- [ ] No, I just want to suggest it

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
